.mobmenu-content .wp-block-buttons>.wp-block-button {
    width: 100%;
    text-align: center;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
}
.mobmenu-content a.wp-block-button__link.wp-element-button {
    font-family: "Roboto", Sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 22.4px;
    text-shadow: 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    fill: #FFFFFF;
    color: #0AA0AB;
    background-color: #ffffff29;
    border-style: solid;
    border-width: 1px 1px 1px 1px;
    border-color: #0AA0AB;
    border-radius: 4px 4px 4px 4px;
    padding: 11px 24px 11px 24px;
	  max-width: 327px;
    width: 100%;
}
.mobmenu-content ul.leftmtop {
    position: absolute;
    left: 40px;
    top: 0;
}
.mobmenu-content ul.leftmtop figure.alignleft.size-full.is-resized {
    max-width: 140px;
    margin: 0;
}
ul#mobmenuleft {
    margin-top: 24px;
}
.mobmenu-left-panel .mobmenu-left-bt {
    right: unset;
    top: 15px;   
    left: 20px;
}
#single-post-right-sec #ez-toc-container {
    display: none;
}
.ez-toc-sticky {
    display: none;
}

@media (max-width:1199px){

			display: none;
	}
}
@media (max-width:767px){
	.ez-toc-sticky {
			display: block;
	}

    width: 100%;
    border: none;
    box-shadow: none;

}

	}

	.ez-toc-sticky .ez-toc-sticky-fixed .ez-toc-sidebar #ez-toc-sticky-container nav .ez-toc-sticky-list li a {

/*Profile*/



/*Profile*/
/* Base: font + smaller sizes */
.tqi-profile {
  padding: 22px 16px;
  font-family: Roboto, "Roboto", "Trebuchet MS", Arial, sans-serif;
}

.tqi-profile__inner {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  text-align: center;
}

.tqi-profile__avatar img{
  display:block;
  margin: 0 auto 12px;
  border-radius: 9999px;
}

.tqi-profile__name{
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  font-size: 24px;   /* было 30 */
  font-weight: 700;
}

.tqi-profile__bio{
  margin: 0 auto 14px;
  max-width: 720px;
  font-size: 14px;   /* было 16 */
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Social buttons */
.tqi-profile__social{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}

.tqi-social{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  padding: 9px 12px;     /* чуть компактнее */
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-decoration:none;
  color:#fff !important; /* фикс: всегда белый текст */
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 13px;       /* чуть меньше */
  line-height: 1;
  transition: opacity .15s ease;
}
.tqi-social:hover{ opacity:.92; }

/* Brand colors */
.tqi-social--twitter{ background:#000000; }   /* X */
.tqi-social--facebook{ background:#1877F2; }
.tqi-social--instagram{ background:#E4405F; }
.tqi-social--linkedin{ background:#0A66C2; }
.tqi-social--youtube{ background:#FF0000; }
.tqi-social--reddit{ background:#FF4500; }
.tqi-social--twitter{ background:#000000; }
.tqi-social--telegram{ background:#26A5E4; }

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6fe52692 link-color margin-bottom elementor-widget elementor-widget-theme-post-content" data-id="6fe52692" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" id="cst-p-css" data-widget_type="theme-post-content.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<p> </p>
<figure id="attachment_329" aria-describedby="caption-attachment-329" style="width: 300px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="wp-image-329 size-medium" src="https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture1-300x200.png" alt="" width="300" height="200" srcset="https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture1-300x200.png 300w, https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture1-768x513.png 768w, https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture1.png 939w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px"><figcaption id="caption-attachment-329" class="wp-caption-text">Photo by Joshua Sortino on Unsplash</figcaption></figure>
<p><strong>Quantum</strong></p>
<p>Whenever a phrase with the word ‘quantum’ pops up in a conversation, you can be guaranteed that someone in the room will sigh, stare at you with a blank expression of total resignation and ask you to explain what it is.</p>
<p>If you’re a physicist, the task should be an easy one. At least in principle, though it can be stated that scientists are not the best people to explain a theory to the uninitiated, the non-techie types. Your average Joe finds the theory, jargon and all the maths too much of a struggle. They switch off after a while — not because they’re idiots — but rather out of a forced resignation as to what they’re being told will never directly affect their lives, or more importantly, offer them something of either monetary or educational value.</p><a href="https://events.economistenterprise.com/commercialising-quantum/delegate-registration-vip/?utm_campaign=MA00012363&utm_medium=media-partner&utm_source=impact-events-external-partner&utm_content=cq26-mp-quantuminsider&RefID=cq26-mp-quantuminsider_media-partner_MA00012363" onclick="_gs('event', 'Economist May 2026')" class="responsive-image"><picture><source media="(min-width: 768px)" srcset="https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/CQ26-800x80-1.png"><source media="(max-width: 767px)" srcset="https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/CQ26-800x80-1.png"><img decoding="async" src="https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/CQ26-800x80-1.png" alt="Responsive Image" width="800" height="80"></picture></a><p></p>
<p><em>That is why explaining these things in a clear, succinct and uncomplicated way, will be</em><em> </em><em>—</em><em> </em><em>and this is a guarantee</em><em> </em><em>—</em><em> </em><em>much more important in the coming years, especially because the age of quantum computers (QC) has arrived.</em></p>
<p>With the big corporations, venture capitalists, angel investors and anybody else out there interested in this new technology, there will be a demand for literature, white papers and other forms of content to explain all the intricacies of the science at hand, the difficulties in messaging the magical formulas, the nuances of ‘superposition’, ‘entanglement’ and ‘quantum tunnelling’. Without a basic knowledge of the mechanics of these wonderful phenomena and how they can add value in the future, no business in its right mind would want to invest.</p>
<p><strong>Bringing More Onboard</strong></p>
<p>That’s why, in part, thought leaders, business individuals, scientists with a populist bent are and will be needed at every level to make quantum computers and their potential a definite truth.</p>
<p>Bringing more creative minds on board who see, and can then advocate and popularize in simple language, what things QC can unlock for us a distance down the road is one of the challenges the space faces in the short term.</p>
<p>A new language is needed. A technical xylophone of words translating the unexplainable to that which is explainable.</p>
<p>Gaining advocates for QC from the world of classical computers is another challenge that if correctly done, can reap dividends for those already involved in it. These clever people, be them hardware or software engineers, full-stack programmers, specialists in a certain computer code, the marketing people, designers or CEOs, must see that what is coming is not a threat to their space, not even a competitor.</p>
<p>What QC adds to current technology is complementary by nature. For sure, quantum computers will be better at some tasks than others that classical models do at the moment, but in the main, they will work hand in hand to effectively improve the technological landscape. Hybrid models will be the de facto state, in a world where both models have a job to do in order to improve our lot.</p>
<p><strong>History Lesson</strong></p>
<p>Even today, in 2019, classical computer algorithms and programming is black magic to most people on the planet. The educational opportunities, as well as the literature available online and in bookshops, is too professional, too geeky and out of reach — intellectually speaking —  to the masses. This could be, quite probably, why the computer age really didn’t start cooking with gas until the late 1930s with Turing, rather than a century or so before with Lovelace and Babbage: education, awareness and opportunity were the key.</p>
<figure id="attachment_330" aria-describedby="caption-attachment-330" style="width: 300px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="wp-image-330 size-medium" src="https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture-history-300x300.png" alt="" width="300" height="300" srcset="https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture-history-300x300.png 300w, https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture-history-150x150.png 150w, https://thequantuminsider.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Picture-history.png 350w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px"><figcaption id="caption-attachment-330" class="wp-caption-text">Charles Babbage, Father of the Computer</figcaption></figure>
<p><em>What we need to do is accelerate things, not to go down the same road as we did with classical computers, where we hid it from view, created an elitist phalanx of ‘you can’t come in here unless you have a Ph.D. and your IQ is 300!’.</em></p>
<p>We need to open things up, let them out, simplify the processes in order to understand what quantum computing is and what it can be.</p>
<p><strong><em>The academic rhetoric has got to go.</em></strong></p>
<p>Already in the space, we can see companies and individuals who are bucking the trends, nurturing an environment in the quantum computing world that, if it goes to plan, will make the theory of it far easier to understand for far more people on the planet.</p>
<p><strong>Case Studies</strong></p>
<p><a href="http://whurley.com/">William Hurley</a>, or whurley, co-founder of <a href="https://strangeworks.com/">Strangeworks, Inc</a>, and serial entrepreneur is already doing it with the <a href="https://quantumcomputing.com/beta">Strangeworks Community Platform</a>, a place for people to learn, discuss and develop their skills and knowledge on all things quantum computery.</p>
<p><em>Other companies, too, are following suit: Microsoft and its </em><a href="https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/quantum/language/?view=qsharp-preview"><em>Q# </em></a><em>quantum computer language.</em><a href="https://projectq.ch/"><em> ProjectQ</em></a><em>, from Switzerland<a href="https://thequantuminsider.com/">,</a> welcomes contributions from anyone to use their ‘powerful open-source software for quantum computing’. There’s D-Wave Systems and IBM, too.</em></p>
<p>As this form of cross-collaboration in the quantum computing sphere becomes the state of affairs, more people will use and understand it.</p>
<p>This can only be a good thing.</p>
<p>Long gone are the days when classical mainframe computers were locked away from the public in university labs, guarded by geriatric professors with stiff Germanic accents. The world of tech is opening itself up, showing its human side. This is, fortunately, just as quantum computers are starting to show their true capabilities.</p>
<p>Let’s humanize the whole process!</p>
<p><strong> </strong></p>
<p><strong> </strong></p>
<p> </p>

				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-2382510 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-researchandtech tag-harvard-gazette tag-neutral-atom-qubits tag-quantum-error-correction" role="listitem">
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h3 class="elementor-post__title">

				Harvard Researchers Demonstrate Key Step Toward Scalable Quantum Error Correction			</a>
		</h3>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Mohib Ur Rehman		</span>

<script id="gpa-inline-script-js-after">
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    var gatedPDFs = {"https:\/\/thequantuminsider.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/04\/TQI-Quarterly-Report-Q1-2025-Official.pdf":2377535,"https:\/\/thequantuminsider.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/03\/2025-02-27-Quantum-Market-Map.pdf":2376635,"https:\/\/thequantuminsider.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/03\/03.03.2025-Extracted-Quantum-QKD-report-.pdf":2376316};
    var gpa_enable_cookies = true;

    $('a').each(function() {
        var linkHref = $(this).attr('href');
        if (gatedPDFs.hasOwnProperty(linkHref)) {
            $(this).on('click', function(e) {
                var pdfId = gatedPDFs[linkHref];
                if (gpa_enable_cookies && document.cookie.indexOf('pdf_access_' + pdfId + '=1') !== -1) {
                    return true;
                }
                e.preventDefault();
                if (typeof PUM !== 'undefined') {
                    PUM.open(2376276);
                }
                $('#popup-pdf-redirect').attr('data-pdf-id', pdfId).data('pdf-url', linkHref);
            });
        }
    });

    function checkHubspotResponse() {
        var found = false;
        $('.submitted-message').each(function() {
            if ($(this).text().indexOf("Thank you for filling the form, you will be redirected to a document.") !== -1) {
                found = true;
            }
        });
        if (found) {
            var pdfId = $('#popup-pdf-redirect').attr('data-pdf-id');
            var pdfUrl = $('#popup-pdf-redirect').data('pdf-url');
            if (pdfId && pdfUrl) {
                if (gpa_enable_cookies) {
                    document.cookie = "pdf_access_" + pdfId + "=1; path=/; max-age=" + (60*60*24*30);
                }
                setTimeout(function(){
                    window.location.href = pdfUrl;
                }, 2000);
            }
        }
    }

    setInterval(checkHubspotResponse, 2000);
});
//# sourceURL=gpa-inline-script-js-after
</script>

          <p class="lcn-modal__desc">
            Necessary cookies are always on to ensure the website works. Optional cookies help us understand how the site is used.
            <a class="lcn-link" href="https://resonance.holdings/privacy-policy/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Privacy Policy</a>
          </p>

          <div class="lcn-pref">
            <div class="lcn-pref__row">
              <div class="lcn-pref__text">
                <div class="lcn-pref__name">Necessary</div>
                <div class="lcn-pref__hint">Required for core functionality (cannot be disabled).</div>
              </div>
              <div class="lcn-switch lcn-switch--locked" aria-label="Necessary cookies always enabled">
                <span class="lcn-switch__pill lcn-switch__pill--on" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                <span class="lcn-switch__label">Always on</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="lcn-pref__row">
              <div class="lcn-pref__text">
                <div class="lcn-pref__name">Analytics</div>
                <div class="lcn-pref__hint">Helps us measure traffic and improve the site.</div>
              </div>
              <label class="lcn-switch" for="lcn-analytics">
                <input id="lcn-analytics" type="checkbox">
                <span class="lcn-switch__pill" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                <span class="lcn-switch__label">Allow</span>
              </label>
            </div>

            <div class="lcn-pref__row">
              <div class="lcn-pref__text">
                <div class="lcn-pref__name">Marketing</div>
                <div class="lcn-pref__hint">Used to personalize content/ads across platforms.</div>
              </div>
              <label class="lcn-switch" for="lcn-marketing">
                <input id="lcn-marketing" type="checkbox">
                <span class="lcn-switch__pill" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                <span class="lcn-switch__label">Allow</span>
              </label>

          <button class="lcn-btn lcn-btn-ghost" id="lcn-reject" type="button">
            Reject non-essential
          </button>
          <button class="lcn-btn lcn-btn-ghost" id="lcn-accept" type="button">
            Accept all
          </button>
          <button class="lcn-btn lcn-btn-primary" id="lcn-save" type="button">
            OK
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <style>
      :root{
        --lcn-blue:#1f5fbf;
        --lcn-text:#5b6b7a;
        --lcn-bg:#fff;
        --lcn-border:rgba(0,0,0,.08);
        --lcn-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
        --lcn-radius: 10px;
      }

      /* ===== Banner ===== */
      .lcn-banner{
        position:fixed;
        left:0; right:0; bottom:0;
        z-index:999999;
        background:var(--lcn-bg);
        border-top:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
      }
      .lcn-inner{
        max-width:1200px;
        margin:0 auto;
        padding:16px 20px max(16px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:space-between;
        gap:20px;
      }
      .lcn-text{
        flex:1;
        font-size:17px;
        line-height:1.45;
        color:var(--lcn-text);
      }
      .lcn-actions{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:12px;
        flex-shrink:0;
      }
      .lcn-btn{
        font:inherit;
        font-size:15px;
        line-height:1.2;
        padding:8px 14px;
        border-radius:6px;
        cursor:pointer;
        text-decoration:none;
        white-space:nowrap;
        display:inline-flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        border:1px solid transparent;
        background:#fff;
      }
      .lcn-btn:focus{ outline: 2px solid rgba(31,95,191,.35); outline-offset: 2px; }
      .lcn-btn-primary{
        background:var(--lcn-blue);
        border-color:var(--lcn-blue);
        color:#fff;
      }
      .lcn-btn-ghost{
        background:#fff;
        border-color:var(--lcn-blue);
        color:var(--lcn-blue);
      }

      /* ===== Modal ===== */
      .lcn-modal{
        position:fixed;
        inset:0;
        z-index:1000000;
        display:none;
      }
      .lcn-modal.is-open{ display:block; }
      .lcn-modal__backdrop{
        position:absolute;
        inset:0;
        background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);
      }
      .lcn-modal__panel{
        position:relative;
        width:min(720px, calc(100% - 32px));
        margin: clamp(16px, 6vh, 64px) auto 16px;
        background:var(--lcn-bg);
        border:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
        border-radius:var(--lcn-radius);
        box-shadow:var(--lcn-shadow);
        overflow:hidden;
      }
      .lcn-modal__header{
        padding:16px 18px;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:space-between;
        gap:10px;
        border-bottom:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
      }
      .lcn-modal__title{
        margin:0;
        font-size:18px;
        color:#1b2a3a;
      }
      .lcn-icon-btn{
        width:36px; height:36px;
        border-radius:8px;
        border:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
        background:#fff;
        cursor:pointer;
        font-size:22px;
        line-height:1;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        color:#1b2a3a;
      }
      .lcn-modal__body{
        padding:16px 18px;
      }
      .lcn-modal__desc{
        margin:0 0 14px;
        color:var(--lcn-text);
        line-height:1.5;
        font-size:15px;
      }
      .lcn-link{
        color:var(--lcn-blue);
        text-decoration:underline;
      }

      .lcn-pref{
        border:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
        border-radius:12px;
        overflow:hidden;
      }
      .lcn-pref__row{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:space-between;
        gap:16px;
        padding:14px 14px;
        border-top:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
      }
      .lcn-pref__row:first-child{ border-top:none; }
      .lcn-pref__name{
        font-weight:600;
        color:#1b2a3a;
        font-size:15px;
      }
      .lcn-pref__hint{
        margin-top:2px;
        color:var(--lcn-text);
        font-size:13px;
        line-height:1.35;
      }

      /* Switch */
      .lcn-switch{
        display:inline-flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:10px;
        cursor:pointer;
        user-select:none;
        font-size:13px;
        color:#1b2a3a;
      }
      .lcn-switch input{
        position:absolute;
        opacity:0;
        pointer-events:none;
      }
      .lcn-switch__pill{
        width:46px;
        height:26px;
        border-radius:999px;
        border:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
        background:#eef2f6;
        position:relative;
        flex:0 0 auto;
      }
      .lcn-switch__pill::after{
        content:"";
        position:absolute;
        top:50%;
        transform:translateY(-50%);
        left:3px;
        width:20px; height:20px;
        border-radius:50%;
        background:#fff;
        border:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
        transition: left .18s ease, background .18s ease;
      }
      .lcn-switch input:checked + .lcn-switch__pill{
        background:rgba(31,95,191,.14);
        border-color:rgba(31,95,191,.35);
      }
      .lcn-switch input:checked + .lcn-switch__pill::after{
        left:22px;
        border-color:rgba(31,95,191,.35);
      }
      .lcn-switch--locked{
        cursor:default;
        opacity:.9;
      }
      .lcn-switch__pill--on{
        background:rgba(31,95,191,.14);
        border-color:rgba(31,95,191,.35);
      }
      .lcn-switch__pill--on::after{
        left:22px;
        border-color:rgba(31,95,191,.35);
      }

      .lcn-modal__footer{
        padding:14px 18px;
        display:flex;
        gap:10px;
        justify-content:flex-end;
        border-top:1px solid var(--lcn-border);
        flex-wrap:wrap;
      }

      /* ===== Mobile ===== */
      @media (max-width:768px){
        .lcn-inner{
          flex-direction:column;
          align-items:center;
          text-align:center;
          gap:12px;
          padding:14px 16px max(14px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
        }
        .lcn-actions{ justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }
        .lcn-modal__panel{ width: calc(100% - 24px); }
        .lcn-pref__row{ align-items:flex-start; }
      }
      @media (max-width:360px){
        .lcn-text{ font-size:16px; }
        .lcn-btn{ font-size:14px; padding:7px 10px; }
      }
    </style>

    <script>
      (function(){
        var banner = document.getElementById('lcn-banner');
        var modal  = document.getElementById('lcn-modal');
        var manageBtn = document.getElementById('lcn-manage');
        var acceptAllBtnBanner = document.getElementById('lcn-accept-all');

        var chkAnalytics = document.getElementById('lcn-analytics');
        var chkMarketing = document.getElementById('lcn-marketing');

        var btnReject = document.getElementById('lcn-reject');
        var btnAccept = document.getElementById('lcn-accept');
        var btnSave   = document.getElementById('lcn-save');

        if (!banner || !modal) return;

        var lastFocus = null;

        function secureFlag(){
          return (location.protocol === 'https:') ? '; Secure' : '';
        }

        function setConsentCookie(obj){
          try{
            var maxAge = 180 * 86400;
            var value = encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(obj));
            document.cookie =
              "lcn_consent=" + value +
              "; Max-Age=" + maxAge +
              "; Path=/; SameSite=Lax" + secureFlag();
          }catch(e){}
        }

        function getDefaultConsent(){
          return {
            v: 1,
            necessary: 1,
            analytics: 0,
            marketing: 0,
            ts: new Date().toISOString()
          };
        }

        function openModal(){
          lastFocus = document.activeElement;
          modal.classList.add('is-open');
          modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
          document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';
          // focus first interactive element
          setTimeout(function(){ (chkAnalytics || modal).focus && chkAnalytics.focus(); }, 0);
        }

        function closeModal(){
          modal.classList.remove('is-open');
          modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
          document.documentElement.style.overflow = '';
          if (lastFocus && lastFocus.focus) lastFocus.focus();
        }

        function saveFromToggles(){
          var consent = getDefaultConsent();
          consent.analytics = chkAnalytics && chkAnalytics.checked ? 1 : 0;
          consent.marketing = chkMarketing && chkMarketing.checked ? 1 : 0;
          setConsentCookie(consent);
          // remove UI
          closeModal();
          if (banner) banner.remove();
        }

        function rejectNonEssential(){
          if (chkAnalytics) chkAnalytics.checked = false;
          if (chkMarketing) chkMarketing.checked = false;
          saveFromToggles();
        }

        function acceptAll(){
          if (chkAnalytics) chkAnalytics.checked = true;
          if (chkMarketing) chkMarketing.checked = true;
          saveFromToggles();
        }

        // Banner buttons
        manageBtn.addEventListener('click', openModal);

        // Banner OK = Accept all (simple UX) + still offers manage cookies
        acceptAllBtnBanner.addEventListener('click', function(){
          acceptAll();
        });

        // Modal buttons
        btnReject.addEventListener('click', rejectNonEssential);
        btnAccept.addEventListener('click', acceptAll);
        btnSave.addEventListener('click', saveFromToggles);

        // Close controls (X / backdrop)
        modal.addEventListener('click', function(e){
          var t = e.target;
          if (t && t.getAttribute && t.getAttribute('data-lcn-close') === '1') {
            closeModal();
          }
        });

        // ESC to close
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
          if (!modal.classList.contains('is-open')) return;
          if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal();
        });

        // Minimal focus trap
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
          if (!modal.classList.contains('is-open')) return;
          if (e.key !== 'Tab') return;

          var focusables = modal.querySelectorAll('button,[href],input,[tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
          if (!focusables.length) return;

          var first = focusables[0];
          var last  = focusables[focusables.length - 1];

          if (e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first){
            e.preventDefault(); last.focus();
          } else if (!e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last){
            e.preventDefault(); first.focus();
          }
        });
      })();
    </script>
